_description: Example dataset configuration for `bot.ml.cli build-dataset`. This file documents the DatasetConfig schema (bot.ml.schemas.DatasetConfig) and is verified by the G9_ExampleConfigsParse test. NOTE: the build-dataset subcommand is STUBBED as of M18.A.9 — see bot/ml/cli.py for the gap (DatasetConfig has no anchor_set field, and AssemblerResult has no persistence layer). This example documents the user-facing config shape that will be consumed when build-dataset lands in M18.A.10+.
